title: KR Source Metadata
description: Schema for source metadata — the output of the source engine (محرك المصادر) consumed by the normalization engine (محرك التطبيع). One record per acquired source. Defines the source-agnostic metadata fields that cross the source→normalization boundary within Phase 1. Source-type-specific extensions (e.g., Shamela fields) may be present as additional properties but are not part of this contract.
x-additional-properties-note: Normalizer-specific extensions (e.g., x-shamela-extension fields like shamela_book_id, shamela_author_short, shamela_page_count, shamela_edition, shamela_volume_count, shamela_pub_date, html_qism_field) may be present but are not part of this contract. They are consumed only by their respective normalizers in Phase 1.

schema_version.description: Schema version identifier. Enables forward-compatible parsing when the schema evolves.

book_id.description: User-assigned short ASCII identifier for the source. Convention: transliterated distinctive word(s) from the title, optionally with author keyword.

title.description: Primary title of the source. For books, the title as found in the source metadata. Required — intake aborts if missing.

title_formal.description: Formal title when available and more accurate than the primary title. Null if absent. Downstream stages should prefer this over title when available.

author.description: Full author name. Null if not determinable.

muhaqiq.description: Editor/muhaqiq (المحقق) name, if applicable. Null if absent.

publication_year.description: Publication year. String because format varies (Hijri, Gregorian, combined). Null if absent.

source_type.description: Source type identifier per §2.5 and §7.5. Determines which normalizer in the normalization engine processes this source. Each enum value corresponds to a specific combination of source format, repository, and acquisition method.

science_scope.description: Array of science identifiers that this source is relevant to, per §7.3. A single source may produce excerpts destined for multiple science trees. Science scope flows through the pipeline to Phase 2 engines for placement and science-specific metadata. May be refined during processing.

book_category.description: Category derived from science declaration. single_science: one primary science. multi_science: covers multiple sciences. adjacent_field: related but not a primary science. tangentially_relevant: minimal relevance.

science_parts.description: For multi_science sources: mapping of source sections to sciences. Null for single_science and tangentially_relevant sources.

section.description: Section name or label in the source.

description.description: Brief description of the section's scope.

scholarly_context.description: Structured scholarly metadata about the author and source. Living record — initially populated at intake, enriched over time per §7.3. Null if no data available.

author_death_hijri.description: Author's death year in Hijri calendar.

author_birth_hijri.description: Author's birth year in Hijri calendar.

grammatical_school.description: Author's grammatical school alignment. Critical for nahw/sarf disputes.

geographic_origin.description: Geographic nisba from author metadata. Raw Arabic string.

book_type.description: Source genre/type. matn: base text, sharh: commentary, hashiya: marginal commentary, mukhtasar: abridgment, nazm: versified treatise.

extraction_source.description: How this context was obtained. auto: automated extraction. user_provided: owner input. enriched: post-intake enrichment.

volume_count.description: Number of volumes. 1 for single-volume sources.

total_actual_pages.description: Total content pages across all source files.

source_files.description: List of frozen source files with integrity hashes and page counts.

relpath.description: Path relative to the source storage root for the frozen source file.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the file.

role.description: primary_export: single-volume main file. volume: one file in a multi-volume set. supplementary: additional non-volume file.

volume_number.description: Volume number. Required when role is 'volume', null otherwise.

actual_page_count.description: Number of content pages found in this file.

file_note.description: Optional annotation describing purpose (especially for supplementary files). Null if not applicable.

frozen_source_hash.description: SHA-256 of the frozen source file(s) as a whole, for integrity verification per §7.2. For multi-file sources, this is a hash of the concatenated individual file hashes in canonical order.

edition_notes.description: Free-text about the edition, genre, or relevant context provided by the owner. Null if not provided.

language.description: Language code (ISO 639-1). 'ar' for Arabic, 'en' for English per §1.2 language scope.

intake_utc.description: UTC timestamp of when source intake was performed.

taxonomy_at_intake.description: Snapshot of all active taxonomy versions at intake time. Keys are science_ids, values are taxonomy version strings. Null if not captured.

unrecognized_metadata_lines.description: Metadata segments whose labels did not match any known field pattern. Ensures zero data loss at the metadata level.
